features.name: real_to_integer_conversion_after_floor_sqrt
features.description: Code should include a conversion from real type to integer type following floor and sqrt builtins

features.name: sqrt_builtin_on_real_conversion
features.description: Code should include a sqrt builtin operation applied to a real-converted integer value

features.name: floor_builtin_on_sqrt_result
features.description: Code should include a floor builtin operation applied to a sqrt result
features.snippet:
real sqrt_result = sqrt(3.14);
logic [3:0] Q = logic'[3:0](floor(sqrt_result));

features.name: zext_after_real_to_integer_conversion
features.description: Code should include a zero-extension operation on a value that was converted from real to integer type
